blockers: Header injection via `subject` in buildMimeRaw: subject interpolated into header line without CR/LF rejection. A CRLF in the subject could inject Bcc/Cc/Content-Type headers via the Raw MIME path (attachments ≤100 KB).
Header injection via attachment `filename` in Content-Type / Content-Disposition headers — same CRLF / quote-breakout vector.
nits: Body Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit while charset is UTF-8 — non-ASCII would technically violate.
`new Uint8Array(Buffer.from(...))` wrapping in content_hash is redundant.
Wiring PgQuotaStore into main.ts is deferred to A.8.
